zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Lindsay Lord of Barnweill於大約1267年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，他的父親David de Lindsay25歲，母親Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton20歲。他於1289年與Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford在蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1308年在英國蘇格蘭被列為member of parliament。他去世於1308年在蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德享年42歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Lindsay Lord of Barnweill于大约1267年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾时，他的父亲David de Lindsay25岁，母亲Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton20岁。他于1289年与Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford在苏格兰藍納可爾克勞福德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1308年在英国苏格兰被列为member of parliament。他去世于1308年在苏格兰藍納可爾克勞福德享年42岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Lindsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

variants.name: Linzy
meanings: Altered form of Scottish, Irish, or English   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  . Compare   Lenzy  .

variants.name: Linzey
meanings: English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .

variants.name: Lindsey
meanings: Irish: shortened and Anglicized form of various Gaelic surnames, as for example Ó Loingsigh (see Lynch 1), Mac Giolla Fhionntóg (see McClintock ), and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn and Lynn ).

variants.name: Lincoln
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linsey
meanings: Scottish, Irish, or English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .
Americanized form of German Linse or Swiss German Linsi, see Lins .

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Lindsay Lord of Barnweill was born about 1267, in Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, David de Lindsay, was 25 and his mother, Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton, was 20. He married Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford in 1289, in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. In 1308, at the age of 42, his occupation is listed as member of parliament in Scotland, United Kingdom. He died in 1308, in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, at the age of 42, and was buried in Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Lindsay Lord of Barnweill est né environ 1267, à Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, David de Lindsay, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford en 1289, à Crawford, Lanarkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. En 1308, à l’âge de 42 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1308, à Crawford, Lanarkshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Lindsay Lord of Barnweill um 1267 in Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater David de Lindsay 25 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton 20. Er hat 1289 in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1308, als er 42 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament in Schottland, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb 1308 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland und wurde in Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.Crawford, ML12 6TX: Crawford, McLennan, Texas, Stati Uniti d'America
it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Lindsay Lord of Barnweill è nato il circa 1267 nel Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, David de Lindsay, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford nel 1289, nel Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1308, all'età di 42 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1308, nel Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Lindsay Lord of Barnweillが約1267年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父David de Lindsayは25歳，母Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lambertonは20歳であった。1289年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアクラウフォードでLady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1308年，42歳の時，イギリススコットランドでの職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1308年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアクラウフォードで42歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Lindsay Lord of Barnweill(이)가 대략 1267년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 David de Lindsay(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1289년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 크롤퍼드에서 Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1308년, 42세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 스코틀랜드에서 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1308년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 크롤퍼드에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르에 묻혔다.

pt.Crawford, ML12 6TX: Crawford, McLennan, Texas, Estados Unidos da América
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Lindsay Lord of Barnweill nasceu aproximadamente 1267, em Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, David de Lindsay, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford em 1289, em Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1308, com 42 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament em Escócia, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1308, em Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Lindsay Lord of Barnweill родился около 1267 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени David de Lindsay было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford в 1289 г. в местности кравфорд, ланаркшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. В 1308 году, в возрасте 42 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliament в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1308 г. в местности кравфорд, ланаркшир, Шотландия в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander Lindsay Lord of Barnweill nació aproximadamente 1267, en Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, David de Lindsay, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Lady Beatrix Alice Stewart Of Crawford en 1289, en Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1308, a la edad de 42 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament en Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió en 1308, en Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Ayrshire, Scotland.
